title: Run a Stateless Application Using a Deployment — Updating the deployment
text:
You can update the deployment by applying a new YAML file. This YAML file
specifies that the deployment should be updated to use nginx 1.16.1.
apiVersion
:
apps/v1
kind
:
Deployment
metadata
:
name
:
nginx-deployment
spec
:
selector
:
matchLabels
:
app
:
nginx
replicas
:
2
template
:
metadata
:
labels
:
app
:
nginx
spec
:
containers
:
-
name
:
nginx
image
:
nginx:1.16.1
# Update the version of nginx from 1.14.2 to 1.16.1
ports
:
-
containerPort
:
80
Apply the new YAML file:
kubectl apply -f https://k8s.io/examples/application/deployment-update.yaml
Watch the deployment create pods with new names and delete the old pods:
kubectl get pods -l
app
=
nginx
Apply the new YAML file:
kubectl apply -f https://k8s.io/examples/application/deployment-update.yaml
Watch the deployment create pods with new names and delete the old pods:
kubectl get pods -l
app
=
nginx
